manifest_meta._about: Comprehensive audit manifest for large-scale skill discovery.
manifest_meta._goal: Audit 50+ repos to discover 10,000+ skill-shaped files for mass conversion.

_tiers.tier1: Must-audit: Official cookbooks, major AI frameworks, top vector DBs
_tiers.tier2: Important: Community projects, specialized tools, emerging frameworks
_tiers.tier3: Nice-to-have: Niche tools, experimental projects, archived repos

top_repos.notes: Promptfoo - LLM testing tool (already partially audited)
Vercel AI SDK - popular framework with many examples
Anthropic official cookbook - likely has many skill-shaped examples
Microsoft Prompt Flow - LLM development tool
Awesome ChatGPT Prompts - huge prompt collection
